name: Brand Identity Complete Pipeline
description: End-to-end brand identity creation from brief to full brand system

phases.name: Creative Brief & Direction
phases.output: Structured creative brief with brand direction
phases.command: creative-director methodologies → design-brief I-Lang → design-consultation workshop

phases.name: Color Science & Palette
phases.output: OKLCH-based color palette with accessibility contrast

phases.name: Brand Board Generation
phases.output: 9-panel brand board (logo, applications, essence, typography, etc.)

phases.name: Logo Concept Exploration
phases.output: Multiple logo concepts in SVG and raster
phases.command: brandkit logo system → fal-generate variations → canvas-design final SVG

phases.name: Typography System
phases.output: Type scale with pairings + web font stack

phases.name: Design Documentation
phases.output: DESIGN.md with full token system, usage rules, and brand guidelines
phases.command: design-md create → brand-guidelines verify → reference-design-contract formalize

phases.name: Brand Motion & Animation
phases.output: Animated logo, brand transition, loading animation
phases.command: algorithmic-art p5.js logo → frame-logo-outro video outro → gsap-timeline web animation

phases.name: Brand Mockups & Applications
phases.output: Device mockups, poster, social media templates
phases.command: mockup-device-3d on devices → poster-hero print → imagegen social templates

phases.name: Brand Guidelines PDF
phases.output: Professional brand guidelines PDF with cover, tokens, applications
phases.command: theme-factory style → pdf/minimax-pdf generate → docx as editable version

phases.name: Figma Brand Library
phases.output: Figma library with colors, text styles, components

artifacts: DESIGN.md — full token system and usage rules
Logo system — SVG primary + variations + favicon
Color palette — OKLCH tokens with contrast verification
Typography — type scale + web font pairings
Animated logo — p5.js or GSAP web animation
Guidelines PDF — professional brand guidelines document
Figma library — synced design tokens and components
exit_criteria: Logo in SVG + PNG + favicon formats
